name: Dill Herb Fillets
recipeIngredient: 2 pound Fillet of red snapper, or firm fleshed fish
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the fillets in a single layer, oiled, shallow baking dish.
2. Sprinkle with olive oil, minced parsley, shallots, dill weed, and oregano.
3. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees F until the flesh barely separates when tested with a fork—15 to 20 minutes.
4. Baste twice with pan juices while baking.
5. Remove fish to a serving dish.
6. Blend lemon juice into pan drippings, then pour over fish.
